appName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

appDescription.message: See a site's TLS certificate at a glance — validation level (DV/IV/EV), issuer, organization, and expiration countdown.
appDescription.description: Short description shown in Chrome Web Store.

popupIntro.message: Certificate information will display here when you open an HTTPS page.

popupLoadingMessage.message: Loading validation data, try opening this popup again.

popupHttpMessage.message: Data sent to / received from this site is transmitted in plaintext.

popupFetchErrorMessage.message: Try reloading the page. Note that this extension only works with publicly accessible sites.

validationDVMessage.message: The website operator's control over this domain has been validated.

validationIVMessage.message: The website operator's identity (individual or organization) has been validated.

validationEVMessage.message: The website operator's identity (usually organization) has been validated.

validationNoneMessage.message: Could not validate this site's certificate.
